6abc1e3b_t1.question: [initial mood opener]
6abc1e3b_t1.anonymised_answer: Great team and exciting new things coming up!

6abc1e3b_t3.question: When you say it's a 'great team,' what does that look like in your day-to-day work?

6abc1e3b_t5.question: Can you think of a specific time recently when you felt that support from the team?
6abc1e3b_t5.anonymised_answer: A colleague tested something for me while I was working remotely, even without me asking for it

6abc1e3b_t7.question: How did that gesture change how your day went?
6abc1e3b_t7.anonymised_answer: I don't think my day would have went in a totally different direction without, but still gave me a good feeling

6abc1e3b_t9.question: When you have those good days, how much of that comes from the actual work you're getting done?
6abc1e3b_t9.anonymised_answer: a good portion - happy customers can make a good day

6abc1e3b_t11.question: What's a recent moment where you felt like your work really made a difference for a customer?
6abc1e3b_t11.anonymised_answer: I managed to finally close a long case with a very patient customer. He was very happy with it at the end

6abc1e3b_t13.question: When you're in the middle of those long, complex cases, how do you usually manage the pressure?
6abc1e3b_t13.anonymised_answer: Depends from case to case, mostly by talking to colleagues

6abc1e3b_t15.question: When things get particularly busy or tricky, how do you find your stress levels hold up?
6abc1e3b_t15.anonymised_answer: So far I think I managed quite well to not let it affect my personal life.

6abc1e3b_t17.question: When you're actually in the thick of a busy shift, how do you know when you're starting to reach your limit?
6abc1e3b_t17.anonymised_answer: I don't think that has happened yet

857cc662_t1.question: [initial mood opener]
857cc662_t1.anonymised_answer: There's a lot of stuff going on - new stuff i haven't tried before. So lots of learning opportunities

857cc662_t3.question: What's an example of something you've worked on recently that was a first for you?
857cc662_t3.anonymised_answer: Big and pretty complex reconciliations of accounts since they haven't been done for a long time

857cc662_t5.question: How did you go about getting started on something that complex?
857cc662_t5.anonymised_answer: Asked a team-member for help with the first one and then just good old trial and error from there.

857cc662_t7.question: When you finally got those accounts to balance, what was that moment like for you?
857cc662_t7.anonymised_answer: Amazing - the first one i got help with i didn't feel like i really understood. But with the next one i got shown that i clearly did. To a degree at least

857cc662_t9.question: With those kinds of complex tasks on your plate, how has your stress level been lately?
857cc662_t9.anonymised_answer: Personally work isn't my biggest stress factor at the moment. It's more school at the moment. I feel like it's nice that the complexity is higher at work so you get to deep dive into "just work" for a while

857cc662_t11.question: When you're in the middle of one of those deep dives, how confident do you feel about handling whatever the reconciliation throws at you?
857cc662_t11.anonymised_answer: Pretty confident - working with difference reconciliations of course prepares me to tackle bigger stuff in the future. But i also have a great team that are always ready with an assist if stuff just doesn't balance or make sense

857cc662_t13.question: Since you mentioned this work prepares you for bigger things, how do you feel about your future path here?
857cc662_t13.anonymised_answer: Pretty good - really starting to feel like i'm getting a good foundation for a future here and for any future endeavors

857cc662_t15.question: When you think about the next six months or so, what are you most looking forward to?
857cc662_t15.anonymised_answer: Continuing to learn and develop in the role i'm in. Hopefully the role can expand a bit with more knowledge

857cc662_t17.question: If you could change one thing about how your role is currently set up to make that learning even better, what would it be?
857cc662_t17.anonymised_answer: Getting more involved in projects in the team that i might not be directly executing on - just getting a feel for what people are doing and how they are doing it could be awesome.

86206459_t3.question: Can you tell me about a specific task or project lately that felt particularly motivating?
86206459_t3.anonymised_answer: UI/UX design for a new “portal/hub” inside the website

86206459_t5.question: What was it about working on that portal that made it stand out from your usual tasks?
86206459_t5.anonymised_answer: Design from the bottom and up

86206459_t7.question: With that kind of creative freedom and responsibility, how has your stress level been lately?

86206459_t9.question: When things do get busy or a deadline approaches, how do you usually handle that pressure?

86206459_t11.question: Since you're enjoying building things from the ground up, how do you feel about the direction the product is heading in general?

86206459_t13.question: What's something coming up in the next few months that you're actually looking forward to?
86206459_t13.anonymised_answer: Bit hard to say as all my tasks is pretty ad hoc but maybe assisting on redesigning an important component in the app

86206459_t15.question: Since your work tends to be more ad hoc, how does that affect your ability to plan out your week?
86206459_t15.anonymised_answer: Doesn’t affect it in a negative way as I am working part time

86206459_t17.question: When those ad-hoc tasks or tricky design problems pop up, how confident do you feel about tackling them on your own?

86206459_t19.question: When you finish one of those design components, how do you know if it’s actually made a difference for the users?

86206459_t21.question: How does it feel to put work out there without knowing the impact it has on the people using it?
86206459_t21.anonymised_answer: Haven’t thought about it before now

bc434cbe_t1.question: [initial mood opener]
bc434cbe_t1.anonymised_answer: Organizing my time, being able to focus well

bc434cbe_t3.question: What does a good stretch of focused work actually look like for you?
bc434cbe_t3.anonymised_answer: It would probably be a time where I don't get easily distracted by new emails or messages, but can calmly finish one task and then get to the next ones

bc434cbe_t5.question: How often does a typical day actually allow for that kind of sequence?
bc434cbe_t5.anonymised_answer: It does quite often! However sometimes some tasks come to a standstill because I can't move forward without an external reply so I am forced to put it on pause and focus on something else

bc434cbe_t7.question: When you have to put something on pause like that, how does it affect how you feel about your progress at the end of the day?
bc434cbe_t7.anonymised_answer: It can make me feel less productive, but I also learned to recognise that I did all that was needed from my side at that point in time

bc434cbe_t9.question: When those tasks do get finished, how much of a sense of accomplishment do you get from them?
bc434cbe_t9.anonymised_answer: I usually get a sense of accomplishment, but sometimes if something gets very stretched in time it minimizes that feeling of completion a little

bc434cbe_t11.question: Beyond those specific tasks, how much do you feel like the work you're doing day-to-day really matters to the bigger picture here?
bc434cbe_t11.anonymised_answer: I feel like it does - even tho as a part time employee it doesn't feel like i contribute as much as full timers

bc434cbe_t13.question: What is it that makes the full-timers' contribution feel more significant than yours?
bc434cbe_t13.anonymised_answer: I just meant it as the amount of time they put in - but it is true that time spent in the office is not the only relevant factor, so it is more like a little trap my brain falls into

bc434cbe_t15.question: Since you're in the office part-time, what's the general vibe like for you when you are there?
bc434cbe_t15.anonymised_answer: very nice and relaxed - I actually do feel as if i was here full time :)

bc434cbe_t17.question: When you think about the next few months here, what's your gut feeling about where things are heading?
bc434cbe_t17.anonymised_answer: I feel excited about all the new growth and development while finishing my studies :)

bc434cbe_t19.question: When you think about that growth and development, what specific opportunities are you most looking forward to?
bc434cbe_t19.anonymised_answer: maybe more responsibility in my role, understanding more complex issues, being able to make more independent decisions

f2e9c94a_t3.question: What was the feedback specifically about?
f2e9c94a_t3.anonymised_answer: about my performance in the office

f2e9c94a_t5.question: Was there a specific project or moment they pointed to?
f2e9c94a_t5.anonymised_answer: he said everything looks nice and tidy in the office and he never had to ask me for it

f2e9c94a_t7.question: When you think about keeping things running smoothly like that, how much does that feel like it contributes to the bigger picture of the company?
f2e9c94a_t7.anonymised_answer: it contributes a lot. it is very important that everyone here enjoy the workspace

f2e9c94a_t9.question: When you're heading home after a shift like that, what's the main thing on your mind?
f2e9c94a_t9.anonymised_answer: to do the same the day after

f2e9c94a_t11.question: When things get particularly busy or messy, how does that affect your stress level?
f2e9c94a_t11.anonymised_answer: I focus on what needs to be fixed or solved until it works again, without neglecting the rest

f2e9c94a_t13.question: When you're in the middle of one of those busy moments, how do you decide what needs to be fixed first?
f2e9c94a_t13.anonymised_answer: Common sense. But if I'm unsure, I ask my colleagues. It's always good to have other points of view.

f2e9c94a_t15.question: When you think about the next few months here, how are you feeling about where things are heading?
f2e9c94a_t15.anonymised_answer: in my case, it means continuing to make improvements in the workspace

f2e9c94a_t17.question: Beyond those workspace improvements, how do you feel about the direction the company as a whole is moving in?
f2e9c94a_t17.anonymised_answer: The company has recently launched a new product, and I believe that will cause it to grow, expand, and become very well-known

f2e9c94a_t19.question: As the company grows and becomes better known, how do you see your own role evolving alongside that expansion?
f2e9c94a_t19.anonymised_answer: In a tidy yet cool workspace, where it's pleasant to spend a large part of the day, work is always better. And when everyone works well, the results are good
